problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: If Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
